description:
Test redundancy audit (2026-05-20) found the integration suite is sound in substance -- no obsolete, ignored, or assertion-free tests -- but carries ~600-800 lines of avoidable copy-paste. tests/common/ is well-built yet under-used: files re-implement scaffolding locally instead of importing it. Eliminating this loses zero coverage and makes the remaining scenario logic readable instead of buried under repeated setup.

Scope -- fixture consolidation (move into tests/common/, delete local copies):
- three_way() 3-clone fixture (bare remote + alice + bob) is byte-identical in 5 files: multi_dev_basic.rs, multi_dev_conflict.rs, lifecycle_sync.rs, lifecycle_sync_close.rs, claim_sync.rs.
- Deferred-mode seed/gate_child/show_json hand-rolled in forge_delivered_in.rs, close_delivered_repo.rs, delivered_repo.rs -- common/forge.rs already exports seed + gate_child (forge_deferred*.rs import them correctly); show_json is byte-identical across two files and should join common/.
- break_remote()/write_some_code() byte-identical in lifecycle_sync.rs and lifecycle_sync_close.rs.
- doctor() helper byte-identical in doctor.rs and doctor_master_url.rs.
- set_core_bare() byte-identical in bare_discovery.rs and bare_squash.rs.
- The version:1 config literal is hand-written in ~15 files via 11 differently-named seed fns (seed_config, write_config, seed_master_url_config -- itself byte-identical across federated_hygiene.rs and remaster_detach_master_url.rs -- write_legacy_config, etc.). Add one parameterized common::seed_config(repo, &[(key,val)]) builder and collapse the variants.

Scope -- genuine duplicate test cases (delete, coverage retained elsewhere):
- plugin_sync.rs: story_70_auth_expired_warns_and_skips and sync_with_auth_expired_skips_plugin prove the same auth-expired path -- merge into one test asserting both the stderr warning and the no-op effect.
- plugin_sync.rs: story_67_sync_triggers_plugin_sync is a strict subset of auth_check_and_sync_receive_config_path -- delete it.
- init.rs: story_2_init_twice_is_idempotent is a strict subset of topology.rs::bl_init_is_idempotent -- delete it (keep init_bare.rs's bare-specific variant, distinct path).

Out of scope (deferred): merging over-fragmented file clusters (sync_*, forge_*, remaster_*, lifecycle_sync*) -- that intersects the 300-line decomposition convention and is a separate judgment call. *_compat.rs / forward_compat.rs are NOT obsolete (guard live serde compat at distinct layers) -- do not touch.

Done = all duplicated helpers live once in tests/common/, the 3 duplicate tests are gone, make check is green (all tests pass, 100% coverage gate holds).
title: Consolidate test fixture duplication into tests/common
